title: androsace mairei var. mairei
intro: Androsace mairei var. mairei, also known as the Pyrenean rock jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its roots and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Androsace mairei var. mairei include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
